summary: Iteration 70 - P0 Google Autocomplete real mode + manual key, urgent listings, seed data validation, showcase revalidation. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: Homepage stuck in loading, admin urgent listings working.

ui_bugs.issue: Homepage stuck in loading state - 'Kategoriler yükleniyor...' and 'Vitrin ilanları yükleniyor...' persist for > 12 seconds even though API returns data correctly
Urgent count shows ACİL (0) instead of expected 70+ items from API

action_items: CRITICAL: Investigate why HomePage categories and showcase are stuck in loading state despite API returning correct data
Check if there's a frontend filter/mapping issue that causes categories to not render
Verify urgent count API integration on homepage - may be calling different endpoint than /api/v2/search
critical_code_review_comments: ListingDetails.js: Manual GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY input correctly persists to localStorage and triggers autocomplete
HomePage.js: Revalidation events (focus, storage, visibility) correctly implemented
AdminShowcaseManagement.js: Publish correctly dispatches custom events for homepage revalidation
Backend /api/places/config correctly returns fallback mode when no key configured

success_rate.frontend: 50% (Admin urgent listing works, Homepage stuck in loading)

seed_data_creation: E2E seed data verified - 131 urgent listings, 211 showcase listings, 5137 total listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all passing. Homepage frontend has loading issue - categories and showcase stuck in loading state. Admin panel urgent listings working with pagination. Google Places config fallback mode working correctly.

verified_features.places_config_endpoint: Returns fallback mode without key, manual_key_supported=true
verified_features.places_autocomplete_endpoint: Returns fallback mode gracefully, handles invalid keys, no crash on edge cases
verified_features.urgent_listings_filter: API correctly filters doping_type=urgent, pagination works, high page returns empty
verified_features.seed_data_real_estate: 3+ root categories with 2+ children each verified
verified_features.completion_panel: Implemented in ListingDetails.js with progress bar and checklist
verified_features.google_maps_manual_key: Input field renders, persists to localStorage, enables real mode
